resources.string: Update existing or Add new expiration
Search with barcode, dates, and employee
View expired or expiring this week
You are not authorized to view this screen.
Product data/images provided by\nOpenFoodFacts.org (ODbL / CC BY-SA)

This application helps users manage food products, track expiration dates, and organize inventory to ensure food is safe to consume and reduce waste. It is designed for grocery stores, small businesses, and gas stations that want to maintain fresh, up-to-date stock.

Best By Manager uses data from Open Food Facts — a free, open, and crowdsourced food product database created by a non-profit community of volunteers around the world. Launched in 2012, Open Food Facts aims to make food information transparent and accessible for everyone.
I am grateful to the Open Food Facts team and contributors for providing this incredible resource.

• Product data is © Open Food Facts contributors and is available under the Open Database License (ODbL).\n\n• Product images are licensed under Creative Commons Attribution–ShareAlike (CC BY–SA 3.0).
All product data and images are sourced from Open Food Facts. You can learn more or contribute your own data at OpenFoodFacts.org.
This app is an independent project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Open Food Facts.
To recover your account, set a screen lock (PIN/pattern) or biometrics in Android settings.
This will permanently delete ALL users, inventory, and settings on this device. This cannot be undone.\n\nType delete to continue.
Are you absolutely sure? This will wipe everything on this device.
Recovery is unavailable until at least one account exists.
Password recovery is not enabled by an administrator.
Device PIN/pattern or biometrics is not available.
All inventory, employee records, and settings are stored locally on this device only. Nothing is backed up to any external service.

No app data is transmitted except optional barcode lookup requests to Open Food Facts when offline mode is disabled. Open Food Facts is a free, open food product database. You can disable these lookups in Administrator settings by enabling offline mode.
Best By Manager contains no analytics, no crash reporting, no advertising, and no user accounts outside this device.
• Camera — used only to capture product photos, stored locally on this device.\n\n• Notifications — used only for expiration reminders and 7-day early warning alerts (Android 13+).

The first account created after installing the app becomes the owner and administrator automatically. The owner sets a password during setup and is the only account that can transfer ownership, enable recovery, or wipe app data.

Go to Administrator → Employee Details. Enter the employee\'s name and save. A temporary password is generated for admin accounts. Non-admin employees set their own PIN the first time they select their name from the employee list.

Open Product Details from the main screen or product list. Scan or type a barcode — if the product exists locally or in Open Food Facts, fields will pre-fill. Enter brand, name, quantity, expiration date, weight, and category, then save.

The Product List shows all active (non-expired) stock sorted by expiration date. Use Product Search to find expired items or items expiring within a date range. Tap the bell icon on the expiration field to enable a 7-day early warning reminder for a product.
When a product is loaded in Product Details, the overflow menu shows a Discard option. Enter the quantity discarded and an optional reason. Discards are recorded and included in employee reports.

The owner can transfer ownership to any existing admin from the Administrator Dashboard overflow menu. Biometric or device credential verification is required. Recovery enrollment is cleared on transfer and must be re-enabled by the new owner.

Employees select their name from the employee list. On first selection a PIN is required (4–8 digits). On future selections the PIN must be entered to confirm identity. After 5 failed attempts the account locks for 5 minutes.

Product Search generates product reports filterable by barcode, date range, or both. Employee Search generates employee reports showing entries, expired counts, and discard totals. Reports can be copied to clipboard or shared via any app.
For more help and frequently asked questions, visit:
